create.title: Share a secret securely
create.lead:
Share passwords without leaving them anywhere.
We encrypt in your browser, hand you a one-time
link, and delete everything after retrieval.
The server never sees the plaintext.
create.placeholder: What do you want to share?
create.dropzoneHint: max 25 MB total · stays encrypted in your browser
create.senderNameHelp: Inserted as a signature in the prefilled email, so the recipient immediately sees who the secret is from.
create.recipientNameHelp: Used as a personal salutation in the prefilled email — e.g. "Hello Maria," instead of just "Hello,". Builds extra trust with the recipient.
create.error.dailyLimit: Daily limit reached (24 secrets per day). Please try again tomorrow.
create.advancedLead: These fields are optional. Recommendation: use a passphrase when sending the link over an untrusted channel like email.
create.passphraseHelp: Adds an extra encryption layer. The recipient then needs both the URL AND the passphrase. Send the passphrase via a separate channel (phone, Signal, Threema).
create.notifyHelp: We'll notify you at this address once the secret has been retrieved. Neither content nor the link is included — only a timestamp and an anonymised IP hash.
create.hintLabel: Hint for the recipient (visible before decryption)
create.hintHelp: Short text shown to the recipient before they open the secret. Useful for context, e.g. "Login customer system X". Don't put anything confidential here — the hint is stored unencrypted.
create.uploadWaitHint: Please wait — files are being encrypted in your browser and uploaded. Don't close this window.
create.resultLead: Copy the link and send it to the recipient. The key in the URL fragment (#…) never leaves this browser.
create.mailBurn: 🔥 The link only works once — whoever opens it after you sees nothing.
create.mailPassphrase: 🔑 You will also need the passphrase, which I am sending you through a separate channel.
create.error.empty: Please enter text or attach a file.
create.error.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again in a moment.
create.error.badResponse: Invalid server response. Please try again.
view.title: View secret
view.passphrasePrompt: This secret is protected by a passphrase.
view.burnedNote: This secret has been deleted and cannot be retrieved again.
view.error.zipFailed: Could not create the ZIP. Please download the files individually.
view.error.locked: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
transparency.title: How safe is this?
transparency.e2e.title: End-to-end encrypted:
transparency.e2e.body: Encryption and decryption happen only in your browser (AES-256-GCM). The server never sees the plaintext.
transparency.key.title: Key in the URL fragment (#…):
transparency.key.body: The key sits behind the # in the URL. Browsers never send that part to any server — including ours.
transparency.ip.title: IP only as an HMAC hash:
transparency.ip.body: We hash your IP with a secret key (HMAC-SHA-256) for abuse protection. The plain IP is not stored.
transparency.ephemeral.title: Automatic deletion:
transparency.ephemeral.body: Secrets are removed from the database after first retrieval or after expiry. Backups explicitly exclude the secret table.
transparency.limits.title: Anti-abuse limits:
transparency.limits.body: Per IP: 24 secrets per day, 10 requests per minute. Tokens get locked for 15 minutes after 5 failed passphrases.
